basic_details.job_title: UCIL GOT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Graduate Operational Trainee Posts
basic_details.short_information: Uranium Corporation of India (UCIL) Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ucil.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the UCIL Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age Relaxation: ST: 5 years; PwBD (UR/EWS): 10 years; PwBD (ST): 15 years; J&K domicile (01.01.1980-31.12.1989): 5 years (additional for reserved categories).

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Chemistry) - 3 years course OR B.Sc. (Chemistry Honours) with Physics and Mathematics as subsidiary subjects.
qualification.details: Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D): B.Sc. (Chemistry) - 3 years course OR B.Sc. (Chemistry Honours) with Physics and Mathematics as subsidiary subjects. Minimum marks: UR/EWS 60% aggregate, ST 55% aggregate (as on 23.05.2026).

selection_process: Written Test / Trade Test / Personal Interview Document verification Medical fitness & character/antecedent verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UCIL Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the UCIL Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission of applications is 23 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.Sc. (Chemistry) – 3 years course OR B.Sc. (Chemistry Honours) with Physics and Mathematics as subsidiary subjects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 29,990/- to Rs. 46,720/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test / Trade Test / Personal Interview, followed by document verification and medical fitness & character/antecedent verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Jaduguda, Jharkhand, with the pincode 832102.
